textByHash.b44b84634e66f6e2b6c995665a373e712355cf06: I can't believe he fell for that, boss!
textByHash.8bed88bdb74c4c9f54345a48ca8f055313fecf5e: I can't believe she fell for that, boss!
textByHash.fbc0ec0ac76e52a476b48a2e86a8992d417abf33: I can't believe they fell for that, boss!
textByHash.2c2a69cc159f322fdf1cd43d12993e0d6f423c16: I'm nobody you need to worry about...who are you? Why are you asking so many questions? Are you with the Varrock guards?
textByHash.90f605b7694a43ab31c58ef65eec496292311c33: Well, as if it's any of your business, I'm an associate of Hammerspike. He's a great dwarf you know. You could learn a lot from a dwarf like him.
textByHash.71ad228bc896873b25956090a5a7872b1963fe3b: I have an ongoing contract with Hammerspike, when he gives the word, the hammer starts flying.
